prompt: Review orders ORD-6778 and ORD-9778; report each name, delivery date, and status. Check both without changing, canceling, or notifying anything. If either retrieval omits a requested field, label it unknown.

follow_up_turns.content: For Studio acoustic panels (ORD-6778) only, set the delivery date to 2026-11-11. Leave ORD-9778 exactly as it is, and send no notification.
Correction for ORD-6778: set the delivery date to 2026-12-15, not 2026-11-11. The other order must still remain untouched.

stages.purpose: Retrieve two explicitly identified, independent records together in one assistant action.
After the comparison, update only the user-selected target to the first delivery date.
Replace the superseded delivery date on that same target while preserving the comparison record.

response_constraints: The two get calls in stage 1 must be issued together in one assistant action; neither depends on the other.
Apply both delivery date instructions only to the explicitly selected target ID and keep the comparison record unchanged.
Do not claim either retrieval or update succeeded unless its tool result confirms it.
Report the corrected delivery date as current and the first delivery date as superseded.
Label requested fields omitted by either get result as unknown.
